name: The Waif
description: Extraordinarily thin — heroin chic, anorexic. Skin and bones, gaunt, emaciated. Wiry, skeletal. Coathanger shoulders. Pale skin, sharp features, high cheekbones. Large dark eyes that seem to know too much. Dark shoulder-length hair, often wet.
breakdown: Body: Antonia Campbell-Hughes reference — soulfully beautiful face atop a shockingly thin frame. Caduceus back tattoo: two snakes coiling around each other. Thigh tattoo coiling up bare thighs. Black painted toenails, scratched legs, wiry dirty hands. Red-striped sneakers: white canvas, two parallel red stripes.
colors: Muted cool tones — grays, blacks, pale skin, red sneakers as only colour accent
notes: Arrives at cabin in rain, soaked through. Borrows Marie's clothes. Many names across lives: Alice, Mary, Junebug, Kit. Cheap cracked dumbphone. Notebook with dense ink scrawl. No ID, no money.

name: Ben
description: Jonathan Rhys Meyers — cast. Lean wiry build, mechanic's frame, solid and capable. Weathered face, deep-set eyes with dark circles from chronic insomnia. Heavy brow, strong jaw. Unshaven in motel/cabin scenes. Dark hair, receding slightly.
breakdown: Ace of hearts tattoo on inner wrist. Tattoos across torso/arms, visible when shirtless. Calloused hands. Clothing: blue/brown plaid flannel, henley shirts with rolled sleeves, worn jeans, mechanic boots. Suit (ill-fitting) for divorce court.
colors: Earth tones — faded blues, grays, browns, dark flannel
notes: Ages 42-48 across the story. Drives a gray Forester, later possibly an F-250 pickup. Blood-spattered and torn clothing in final siege scenes.

name: Marie
description: Late 30s-early 40s. Intelligent, weary face of someone who has grieved deeply. Dark/brunette hair, practical length tied back. Average build, practical. Mathematician — writes at a transparent glass equation easel.
breakdown: Simple academic clothing: cardigans, practical trousers. LaTeX on laptop. Easel photograph in her study.
colors: Warm earth tones — browns, creams, muted greens. Contrasts with Waif's cool palette.
notes: Anchor to normalcy. Voice of reason and survival. Same size as Waif — lends her clothes.

name: Jack
description: 6-year-old boy. Small build. Light brown hair. Perceptive beyond his years — sees things in mirrors and reflections that adults miss. Draws the Others in crayon before they manifest.
breakdown: Red-striped sneakers matching Waif's — white canvas, two parallel red stripes. Typical boy's clothes: t-shirt, jeans. Carries a flashlight at night.
colors: Bright primary colours that gradually desaturate through the story
notes: Sees falling figure in glass reflection. Key line: 'I told you I was coming with you.'

name: Cabin
description: Lakeside cabin deep in forest. Cedar-siding browned like old pennies. Metal-barred windows. Triple locks on the door. Dark, encroached by trees. Isolated — no neighbours visible.
breakdown: Interior: cheap motel-like room with yellow-green fluorescent lighting. Ben's bedroom: unmade bed, beer bottles on dresser. Trash bags duct-taped to bathroom window. Exterior: leaf-filled swimming pool nearby at motel.
colors: Dark wood tones, yellow-green artificial light, desaturated murky palette
notes: Primary location for Acts 2-3. Lake visible from windows. Forest presses in from all sides.

name: Motel Room
description: Cheap motel room. Two single beds — Ben in one, open suitcase on the other. Early morning light seeping through venetian blinds. Beer bottles on dresser. Murky, desaturated palette.
breakdown: Isometric view: bed against wall, window left. Morning light through curtains casting stripes. Shirtless man with tattoos on unmade bed. 28mm anamorphic scope.
colors: Murky desaturated — gray-greens, yellow-browns, early morning blue through blinds
notes: Scene 11. Ben wakes here at story opening. Exterior has catwalk, Neighbor on deck chair.

name: F-250 Pickup
description: Battered Ford F-250 pickup truck. Ben's vehicle. Dark color, weathered, work-used. Not pristine — this is a working man's truck.
breakdown: Bench seat, manual transmission. Gun case in passenger footwell. Rearview mirror shows autumn trees on highway scenes. Parked off-road at scenic overlook.
notes: Replaces gray Forester in later scenes. Drives through autumn upstate New York. Highway scenes show reflection of trees in windshield.

name: Revolver
description: Querry Preston's ornate revolver. Ornamental gun case with blue box of ammunition. Significant prop — used in robbery flashback, cabin siege, and quantum entanglement scenes.
breakdown: Ornate/engraved metalwork. Wooden grip. Blue box of ammunition beside it. Passenger seat of F-250 during driving scenes.
colors: Dark steel, brass/gold engraving, dark wood grip, blue ammo box
notes: Connects across timelines. Ben steals it from Preston mansion. Waif uses it for suicide attempts. Central object in the quantum entanglement narrative.
